---
title: "SBoo Solver output"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: github_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

The SteadyState and Dynamic Solver both are capable of using LHS, correlation for different distributions. Here the currently implemented distributions are briefly described.

OVERALL WORK IN PROGRESS [documentation needs to be updated!].

```{r Initialize World, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
source("baseScripts/initWorld_onlyMolec.R")

```
